creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to rozhuk.im from comment #5)
It doesn't matter whether you are a python programmer. If a python app has 'import gi' or 'from gi.repository import Something', it uses gobject-introspection-based bindings and you have to use devel/py-gobject3 to satisfy the dependency instead of devel/py-gobject.
